title: Scary Fabric
description: Horror Mod pack for Fabric Version of Minecraft
body: ![logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/68b18ee32ce02612f884ab4c91ab4a632da4065d.png) > ![Needs Fabric](https://i.imgur.com/pxXcH0Y.png) > _**1.3.0 has released, [Check it on](https://modrinth.com/modpack/scary-fabric/version/1.3.0)**_ # Ðê§¢rïþ†ïðñ The world of fabric is completely devoid of horror So why don't we add these factors together? I present to you a terrifying modpack in the Fabric version with high performance And explore many monuments Be careful of the entities added from the Forge to Fabric You will play in a classic way, but more fun and terrifying # 𐌅𐌄𐌀𐌕𐌵𐌐𐌄𐌔 The mod pack has features like any other terrifying mod pack ## ★ Simplified Graphics ![Increase Frames](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/378bf47f9d9194e113de825579dcd2cd3a7c20a5.png) Fabric has many performance mods that speed up the game to more than 100 frames (without shaders), but it will give a better experience for low-performance computers. ## ✈ Explore More Structures ![Outside](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ccf182880372d75af4a8b750ac2c753c16e3f2fb.png) Mods have been added that contribute to the creation of more structures that give a better experience for exploration and looting as settlements or secret hideouts for the Illager. Be careful when looting them from them. ## ☋ Scary Mobs ![He Watches You](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7ca108aad7eee060c181812ebeb78d15b53b1227.png) The goal of the modpack is to scare the player, and the modpack has most of the scary Forge mods in the Fabric version. With improving some of the mobs in the game ## ✨ Flashlights! **(External site)** ![Exploration](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/12dafe8fb90ba4b2811944224e451da4f6716a7c.png) Bring with you to experience the best “flashlight device” Unfortunately, it will not be in the modpack, but you can download it here "[https://www.planetminecraft.com/data-pack/working-flashlight-datapack/](https://www.planetminecraft.com/data-pack/working-flashlight-datapack/)" Credits for flashlight down ## Insanity Shaders ![Alone](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4d4ed1d672aa648e99e689bee9b9a428507b5cb4.png) There are certain shaders that add terror to the game, but the Insanity Shader was specifically chosen because it has good gameplay # © Äßðµ† Lï§êñ¢ê Flash light From Planetminecraft Owner "HAK0TA538" (Including Datapack and Resourcepack all) "[https://www.planetminecraft.com/data-pack/working-flashlight-datapack/](https://www.planetminecraft.com/data-pack/working-flashlight-datapack/)" DefaultScaryFabricScreen I Made it fully with myself # ![lisence](https://img.shields.io/badge/License-BSD%203%20LISENCE-blue)
